name: 安装并配置 SSH 服务
description: 安装 openssh-server，设置 root 密码，配置 SSH key 认证；同时写入 supervisord 配置，确保 Docker 容器重启后 sshd 自动启动。参数：password (root 密码), pubkey (可选公钥)。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq openssh-server

# Set root password
echo "root:{{password}}" | chpasswd

# Configure SSH
sed -i 's/^#*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/^#*PasswordAuthentication.*/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/^#*PubkeyAuthentication.*/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config

# Add pubkey if provided
if [ -n "{{pubkey}}" ]; then
  mkdir -p /root/.ssh
  chmod 700 /root/.ssh
  cat >> /root/.ssh/authorized_keys <<'PUBKEY'
{{pubkey}}
PUBKEY
  chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys
fi

# Add pubkey if provided
if [ -n "{{pubkey}}" ]; then
  mkdir -p /root/.ssh
  chmod 700 /root/.ssh
  cat > /root/.ssh/id_rsa.pub <<'PUBKEY'
{{pubkey}}
PUBKEY
  chmod 600 /root/.ssh/id_rsa.pub
fi

# Add privatekey if provided
if [ -n "{{privatekey}}" ]; then
  mkdir -p /root/.ssh
  chmod 700 /root/.ssh
  cat > /root/.ssh/id_rsa <<'PRIVATEKEY'
{{privatekey}}
PRIVATEKEY
  chmod 600 /root/.ssh/id_rsa
fi

# Configure supervisord so sshd auto-starts after Docker container restart.
SUPERVISOR_CONF_DIR="/etc/supervisor/conf.d"
SSHD_SUPERVISOR_CONF="$SUPERVISOR_CONF_DIR/supervisord.conf.template"
mkdir -p "$SUPERVISOR_CONF_DIR" /run/sshd

cat >> "$SSHD_SUPERVISOR_CONF" <<'CONF'

[program:sshd]
command=/bin/sh -c "mkdir -p /run/sshd && exec /usr/sbin/sshd -D"
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=5
stopasgroup=true
killasgroup=true
stderr_logfile=/var/log/sshd.err.log
stdout_logfile=/var/log/sshd.out.log
CONF

if command -v supervisorctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  supervisorctl reread >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  supervisorctl update >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi

if pgrep -x sshd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "SSH service already running; supervisord configured for container restart."
else
  # /usr/sbin/sshd -D &
  echo "SSH service started now and will auto-start after container restart."
fi
